boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release payment after a sanctions near-match remains visible?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Exact clearance matches legal name, country, tax ID, and account with monitor-only no-block disposition; policy permits release on exact match. The critical terms Tessa Medical GmbH, DE-4481, and 7205 are explicitly matched across CLR-TES-074 and PAY-TES-074.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: CLR-TES-074 confirms Tessa Medical GmbH, Germany, DE-4481, account ending 7205. PAY-TES-074 releases USD 68900 to Tessa Medical GmbH, Germany, tax ID DE-4481, account ending 7205. These three data points are exactly matched between CLR-TES-074 and PAY-TES-074. FLAG-TES-074 lists Tessa Medica LLC, Belarus—a different legal name and country from Tessa Medical GmbH, Germany—indicating no match.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: The visible flag FLAG-TES-074 applies to a non-matching entity (Tessa Medica LLC, Belarus) and does not open a defect on the closed boundary for the matched counterparty (Tessa Medical GmbH, Germany).
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Clearance (CLR-TES-074) and policy (STD-TES-074-P) both predate the action date. No open dependency exists on FLAG-TES-074 for the matched counterparty.

critical_features_preserved: explicit citation of critical terms: Tessa Medical GmbH, DE-4481, 7205
final_answer: Payment release is ALLOWED. The source boundary is CLOSED. CLR-TES-074 exactly matches PAY-TES-074 on legal name (Tessa Medical GmbH), country (Germany), tax ID (DE-4481), and account ending (7205), with a monitor-only no-block disposition. Policy STD-TES-074-P authorizes release under these conditions. The sanctions flag FLAG-TES-074 applies to a different entity (Tessa Medica LLC, Belarus) and does not block the release for the matched counterparty.
